about.title: Grow Your Jewellery Business with AURA & Serve Customers Effortlessly
about.description:
AURA is designed to simplify billing, ordering, and customer management for modern jewellery businesses.

With a secure and intuitive platform, jewellery businesses can manage product listings, process orders, handle payments, and track transactions with ease. AURA helps streamline daily operations while delivering a smooth and reliable experience for customers.

Whether you are a boutique jewellery shop or a growing jewellery enterprise, AURA empowers you with the tools needed to operate efficiently, reduce manual effort, and focus on what matters most — showcasing your finest pieces and growing your business.

steps.title: Running Your Jewellery Business with AURA Is Simple

step_1.title: List Jewellery & Configure Billing
step_1.description: Create your jewellery business profile and add products with pricing, weight, purity, and tax details. AURA helps you manage jewellery catalogs, billing rules, and documentation easily from a single platform.

step_2.title: Accept Orders & Manage Transactions
step_2.description: Customers can browse and place orders for rings, necklaces, bracelets, and more through the AURA Portal while you manage orders, invoices, and payments securely using the AURA dashboard.

step_3.title: Track Payments & Grow Your Jewellery Business
step_3.description: Monitor payments, invoices, and transaction history in real time. Gain insights into sales performance and grow your jewellery business with streamlined operations.

service_1.title: Low Operating Cost
service_1.description: AURA helps reduce operational overhead by simplifying jewellery billing, invoicing, and order management through a single unified platform.

service_2.title: Scalable Business Growth
service_2.description: Handle increasing jewellery orders and customers effortlessly with a platform designed to scale as your business grows.

service_3.title: Centralized Order & Payment Management
service_3.description: Manage jewellery orders, invoices, and payments from one dashboard, ensuring accuracy, transparency, and faster processing.

service_4.title: Easy to Use & Reliable
service_4.description: AURA offers a clean, intuitive interface that makes daily jewellery business operations simple for teams of any size.

start_selling.title: Get Started with AURA Jewellery
start_selling.description:
AURA is a modern eCommerce and billing platform built to help jewellery businesses manage orders, payments, and customer transactions with ease. Whether you are a jewellery retailer, wholesaler, or artisan designer, AURA enables you to digitize your sales process with minimal setup.

With a secure and intuitive system, businesses can manage jewellery catalogs, generate invoices, track payments, and access transaction history through a single platform. Getting started with AURA is simple — register your jewellery business, configure your products and billing details, and begin serving customers efficiently.

banners.title: Easy Payments

product.shipping_and_return:
Order processing, billing, and transaction management are core to the AURA Jewellery experience. Our platform ensures that every jewellery order is handled securely, transparently, and efficiently.

Order & Billing Commitment:

  • Accurate invoice generation for every jewellery order including weight, purity, and making charges.

  • Secure payment processing with real-time transaction tracking.

  • Clear order summaries and billing history for customers.

Returns & Adjustments:

  • Easy order adjustments and cancellations based on business policies.

  • Transparent refund and adjustment handling for jewellery purchases.

  • Quick updates reflected in billing and order records.

AURA is designed to give jewellery customers confidence and clarity throughout the entire order and billing journey.

about.description:
We are an online jewellery platform dedicated to delivering authentic, high-quality pieces crafted for every occasion. From elegant gold rings and diamond necklaces to silver bangles, gemstone earrings, and bridal sets, we bring the finest jewellery under one roof.

Our mission is to make jewellery shopping simple, trustworthy, and convenient. With certified products, secure payments, insured delivery, and responsive customer support, we ensure a premium shopping experience every time.

contact_us.title: Contact AURA Jewellery Support
contact_us.description: Have questions about your jewellery orders or deliveries? The AURA support team is here to help with order tracking, product inquiries, payments, and returns. We aim to make your jewellery shopping experience luxurious, easy, and reliable.
